_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
author: neil@shrug.games
description:
RuneScape: Dragonwilds is a co-op survival RPG set in the world of RuneScape.
Up to 6 players can explore, craft, build, and battle together on a dedicated
server. RAM recommendation is 2 GB base + 1 GB per player (8 GB for a full
6-player server).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server - Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Steam App ID: 4019830 (free, anonymous login)
# Image: ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian

## Use anonymous login (Dragonwilds dedicated server is free on Steam)
STEAM_USER=anonymous
STEAM_PASS=""
STEAM_AUTH=""

## Download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Install game using steamcmd
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate +quit

## Set up 32-bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## Set up 64-bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Create config directory
mkdir -p /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer

## Create initial DedicatedServer.ini
## Pelican patches the managed keys on every startup; ServerGuid is intentionally
## omitted from config.files so the game-generated value survives restarts.
cat > /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Saved/Config/LinuxServer/DedicatedServer.ini << 'EOF'
;METADATA=(Diff=true, UseCommands=true)
[SectionsToSave]
bCanSaveAllSections=true

[/Script/Dominion.DedicatedServerSettings]
AdminPassword=
OwnerId=
WorldPassword=
ServerName=
DefaultWorldName=
MaxPlayers=6
AdministratorList=()
ServerGuid=
EOF

if [ -f /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Binaries/Linux/RSDragonwildsServer-Linux-Shipping ]; then
    chmod +x /mnt/server/RSDragonwilds/Binaries/Linux/RSDragonwildsServer-Linux-Shipping
else
    echo "WARNING: Could not find RSDragonwildsServer-Linux-Shipping - check /mnt/server for actual binary name"
    ls /mnt/server/ /mnt/server/Binaries/ 2>/dev/null || true
fi

## Install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description:
Anyone who enters this password in the Server Management tab (Pause Menu >
Settings) will be granted admin status. Required for the server to start.

variables.name: Administrator List
variables.description:
Comma-separated list of Player IDs permanently granted admin access in-game.
Do not include parentheses. Example: 12345,67890. Leave empty for no
additional admins beyond the server owner.

variables.name: Auto-update server
variables.description: Enable or disable automatic server updates on restart. Enabled by default.

variables.name: Default World Name
variables.description:
The name of the world created on first startup. Players search for your server
by this world name in the Public tab of the Worlds screen (case-sensitive).

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description:
Maximum number of players (1-6). RAM requirement is 2 GB base + 1 GB per
player, so a full 6-player server needs 8 GB allocated.

variables.name: Owner ID
variables.description:
Your RuneScape: Dragonwilds Player ID. Found in-game at the bottom of the
Settings Menu. Use the copy button to get it from your clipboard. The server
will not start without a valid Owner ID.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server as displayed in the in-game server browser.

variables.name: App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for RuneScape: Dragonwilds Dedicated Server. Do not modify.

variables.name: World Password
variables.description: Optional password players must enter to join your server. Leave empty for a public server.
